basic_details.job_title: Air Force School Panchwati Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Air Force School Panchwati (AFSP) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Teaching and Non-Teaching Staff posts! Published on the official Air Force School Panchwati website, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Master’s Degree, Bachelor’s Degree, B.Ed or equivalent qualification, Diploma in Elementary Education, Nursery Teachers Training Diploma, Graduate degree, or B.Com qualification can apply through the prescribed offline application process until 17 June 2026. Find all details about the AFSP Teaching and Non-Teach

age_limit.age_details: As per rules, with relaxation for women and physically challenged candidates up to a maximum of five years.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree, Bachelors Degree, B.Ed or equivalent, Diploma in Elementary Education, Nursery Teachers Training diploma, Graduate, B Com
qualification.details: Principal: Masters Degree with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognized University in a subject taught in Secondary classes and B.Ed or equivalent, with at least two years of teaching experience as TGT or Principal of a Secondary/Primary Air Force School. TGT Science: Masters or Bachelors Degree with minimum 50% in subject and aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Botany, and Zoology (any three) and B.Ed or equivalent. TGT English: Masters or Bachelors Degree with minimum 50% in subject and aggregate with English as an elective and B.Ed or equivalent. TGT Social Science: Masters or Bachelors Degree with minimum 50% in subject and aggregate with any two of History, Geography, Economics, Political Science (one must be History or Geography) and B.Ed or equivalent. TGT Hindi: Masters or Bachelors Degree with minimum 50% in subject and aggregate with Hindi as an elective and B.Ed or equivalent. TGT Math (Contractual): Masters or Bachelors Degree with minimum 50% in subject and aggregate with Maths and any two of Physics, Chemistry, Electronics, Computer Science, Statistics and B.Ed or equivalent. HM: Graduate Degree with minimum 50% aggregate in a subject taught in Middle/Primary classes and B.Ed or equivalent, with at least two years of teaching experience as PGT/TGT/PRT or three years as NTT or two years as Principal/HM of an Air Force School. PRT: Senior Secondary with 50% marks and a two-year Diploma in Elementary Education or a four-year B.El.Ed or a two-year Diploma in Education (Special Education) or Graduation with 50% and B.Ed with a 6-month Bridge Course in Elementary Education from an NCTE recognized institution. NITT: Senior Secondary with Nursery Teachers Training diploma or Diploma in Nursery/Montessori/Pre-Primary Teachers Training or Diploma in Elementary Education from a Govt recognized institution. Office Superintendent: Graduate with at least five years of experience in office work. Accts Asst: B.Com from a Govt recognized University with knowledge of accounts and book-keeping, and a typing speed of at least 40 wpm in English. Clerk: Graduate from a Govt recognized University, with a typing speed of at least 40 wpm in English. MTS (contractual): No educational qualifications laid down, suitability for trade duties.

selection_process: Written Test for all posts (except MTS) Teaching Ability Test (TAT) & Practical Test for teaching staff Typing test for administrative staff (except MTS) Accounting Knowledge test for Accts Asst Practical Skill test for MTS Interview for all categories
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Air Force School Panchwati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.afspanchwati.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Air Force School Panchwati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Air Force School Panchwati Recruitment 2026 is 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q3. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Air Force School Panchwati, which is www.afspanchwati.com.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: The application fee for the General/OBC category is Rs. 100/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Principal post is a Masters Degree with at least 50% aggregate and a B.Ed or equivalent, along with teaching experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for women, physically challenged candidates, ex-servicemen, and candidates with service in Air Force Schools as per rules.

faq.question: Q7. What are the different stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Teaching Ability Test, Practical Test, Typing Test, Accounting Knowledge Test, Practical Skill Test, and Interview, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the MTS (contractual) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the MTS (contractual) post is Rs. 13000 (Consolidated).

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding this recruitment is www.afspanchwati.com.
